rows.ability: Challenge Speed 15: Deal 10 damage.

rows.name: Vine Snare
rows.ability: Earth: Opposing engaged Creature loses 25 Speed.

rows.name: Web Cocoon
rows.ability: Stat Check Power 50: Your engaged Creature gains Fire.

rows.name: Windslash
rows.ability: Your opponent turns all face-down Battlegear Cards they control face-up.

rows.name: Aqua Shield
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Sacrifice Aqua Shield: Heal 15 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Challor
rows.ability: Equipped Creature cannot be targeted by abilities. This Battlegear begins the game face-up.

rows.name: Cyclance
rows.ability: Sacrifice Cyclance: equipped Creature gains Air until the end of combat.

rows.name: Danian Carapace
rows.ability: When equipped Creature deals damage to an Uninfected Creature, Infect that Creature. When the equipped Creature is destroyed while engaged, destroy all Battlegear equipped to the opposing engaged Creature. Then, if that Creature is Unequipped, equip Danian carapace to it. (Players control any Battlegear equipped to Creatures they control.)

rows.name: Diamond of Vlaric
rows.ability: Sacrifice Diamond of Vlaric: equipped Creature gains Earth until the end of combat.

rows.name: Dragon Pulse
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 25 Courage.

rows.name: Elementalist Pauldrons
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy and 15 Power. Equipped Elementalist Creature has all Elemental Types your Creatures have.

rows.name: Elixir of Tenacity
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 10 Courage and an additional 10 Speed. If equipped Creature has at least 50 Power, it has an additional 10 Energy.

rows.name: Entropy Modulator
rows.ability: Sacrifice Entropy Modulator: Target attack deals 15 damage.

rows.name: Flux Bauble
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, look at the top two cards of your Location Deck. Put one of them on top of that deck and the other on the bottom.

rows.name: Gauntlets of Might
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 25 Power.

rows.name: Heptadd's Crown
rows.ability: Equipped Creature can play Mugic of any tribe. When a Mugic or ability is played by equipped Creature, deal 10 damage to it. This Battlegear begins the game face-up.

rows.name: Hunter's Lure
rows.ability: Sacrifice Hunter's Lure: Relocate both engaged Creatures to any unoccupied space .

rows.name: Ice Cloak
rows.ability: When Ice Cloak is flipped face-up, if equipped Creature is engaged with a Creature with Fire, equipped Creature gains 10 Energy. Equipped Creature has Fireproof 10.

rows.name: Lightning Canister
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. When Lightning Canister is put into your general discard pile from face-up, deal 5 damage to target engaged Creature.

rows.name: Liquilizer
rows.ability: Sacrifice Liquilizer: equipped Creature gains Water until the end of combat.

rows.name: Mandiblor Crown
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Creature Type Mandiblor in addition to its other types. Equipped Creature has Hive: equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy.

rows.name: Mipedian Cactus
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 15 Wisdom. Equipped Mipedian Creature has MC: equipped Creature can move to any space on the board as if it were adjacent.

rows.name: Mowercycle
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 25 Speed.

rows.name: Mugician's Lyre
rows.ability: Sacrifice Mugician's Lyre: Put a Mugic counter on the equipped Creature

rows.name: Nexus Fuse
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Sacrifice Nexus Fuse: Deal 15 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Orb of Foresight
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, look at the top three cards of your Attack Deck. Put one of them on top of that deck and the other two on the bottom in any order.

rows.name: Phobia Mask
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Intimidate: Courage 10 and Intimidate: Power 10.

rows.name: Prism of Vacuity
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Sacrifice Prism of Vacuity: Target Creature loses 20 Power.

rows.name: Pyroblaster
rows.ability: Sacrifice Pyroblaster: equipped Creature gains Fire until the end of combat.

rows.name: Ravita Flower
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Sacrifice Ravita Flower: Put 2 Mugic counters on target Conjuror Creature.

rows.name: Reality Field Generator
rows.ability: When equipped Creature enters a space with a Mirage Location, shuffle that Mirage Location into its controller's Location Deck. Mirage Locations cannot be placed in equipped Creature's space.

rows.name: Ring of Na'arin
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 10 Power and an additional 10 Wisdom. If equipped Creature has at least 50 Courage, it has an additional 10 Energy.

rows.name: Riverland Star
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 15 Courage. Equipped OverWorld Creature has When equipped Creature deals Water damage, heal 5 damage to it.

rows.name: Scout's Monocular
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy and 15 Wisdom. Equipped Scout Creature has MC: Turn target face-down Battlegear face-up.

rows.name: Skeletal Steed
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Range and Swift 1. This Battlegear begins the game face-up.

rows.name: Spectral Viewer
rows.ability: When equipped Creature becomes engaged, Creatures engaged with it lose and cannot gain Invisibility.

rows.name: Staff of Wisdom
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 25 Wisdom.

rows.name: Stingblade Prototype
rows.ability: When Hive is activated, the next time an Attack would deal damage this turn, it deals 10 damage instead.

rows.name: Stone Mail
rows.ability: Equipped Creature cannot move. Equipped Creature has an additional 50 Energy. All damage dealt to equipped Creature is increased by 5. Equipped Creature has no abilities and cannot gain abilities.

rows.name: Supercharged Alterant
rows.ability: When Supercharged Alterant is flipped face-up, choose a Discipline. Equipped Creature gains 100 in the chosen Discipline.

rows.name: Sword of Khy'at
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy and 15 Speed. Equipped Warrior Creature has When equipped Creature deals 20 or more attack damage, deal 5 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Talisman of the Mandiblor
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 15 Speed. Equipped Danian Creature has Sacrifice equipped Creature: Return a Mandiblor Creature Card in your general discard pile to play to any unoccupied space .

rows.name: Telebracers
rows.ability: When Telebracers is flipped face-up, reveal a new active Location.

rows.name: The Doomhammer
rows.ability: Equipped Creature deals an additional 5 Attack damage to UnderWorld and Danian Creatures. Equipped Danian Creature has Earth 5. Equipped UnderWorld Creature has an additional 50 Power.

rows.name: Torrent Krinth
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Water 5.

rows.name: Torwegg
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Air 5.

rows.name: Ur-Shard
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Earth 5 and Recklessness 5. If equipped Creature is destroyed while engaged, destroy all Battlegear equipped to the opposing engaged Creature. Then, if that Creature is Unequipped, equip Ur-Shard to it. (Players control any Battlegear equipped to Creatures they control.)

rows.name: Viledriver
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Fire 5.

rows.name: Vlaric Shard
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Earth 5.

rows.name: Warbeast Power Leash
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Equipped Warbeast Creature has Recklessness 5, has an additional 5 Energy for each Conjuror Creature you control and deals an additional 5 damage with attacks.

rows.name: Whepcrack
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has an additional 15 Power. Equipped UnderWorld Creature has Fire 5.

rows.name: Wind Whip
rows.ability: Equipped Mipedian Creature has Air. If equipped Creature is a Conjuror Creature, Warbeast Creatures you control have Recklessness 5.

rows.name: Windstrider
rows.ability: Equipped Creature has Swift 2. This Battlegear begins the game face-up.

rows.name: Carnival of Confusion
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, Creatures lose all Elemental Types. If a Creature lost Fire, it gains Water. If a Creature lost Water, it gains Air. If a Creature lost Air, it gains Earth. If a Creature lost Earth, it gains Fire. Elemental Attacks deal an additional 5 damage.

rows.name: Castle Bodhran
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, each player can return a Mugic Card from their general discard pile to their hand.

rows.name: Castle Pillar
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, if an engaged Creature has higher Wisdom than the opposing engaged Creature, put a Mugic counter on it.

rows.name: Catacombs of the Conjurors
rows.ability: Damage dealt to Warbeast Creatures by Recklessness is reduced by 5. Conjuror Creatures have Recklessness 5.

rows.name: Cordac Falls
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, engaged Creatures gains 5 Energy.

rows.name: Cordac Falls Plungepool
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, deal 5 damage to engaged Creatures.

rows.name: Crystal Cave
rows.ability: If an engaged Creature has lower Speed than the opposing engaged Creature, it deals 0 damage on its first attack each combat.

rows.name: Doors of the Deepmines
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, Creatures with Water gain 10 Energy.

rows.name: Dranakis Threshold
rows.ability: Mugic and activated abilities cannot be played.

rows.name: Everrain
rows.ability: Water attacks deal an additional 5 damage. Damage dealt by Earth attacks is reduced by 5.

rows.name: Eye of the Maelstrom
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, each player discards a Mugic Card.

rows.name: Fear Valley
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, if an engaged Creature has lower Courage than the opposing engaged Creature, it loses 10 Energy.

rows.name: Forest of Life
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, if an engaged Creature has higher Power than the opposing engaged Creature, it gains 5 Energy.

rows.name: Forest of Life, During Aichlyys
rows.ability: Creatures do not have and cannot gain Invisibility.

rows.name: Gigantempopolis
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, put a Mugic counter on any engaged OverWorld Creatures.

rows.name: Glacier Plains
rows.ability: Creatures must pay an additional Mugic counter to play UnderWorld Mugic Cards.

rows.name: Gloomuck Swamp
rows.ability: Earth attacks deal an additional 5 damage. Damage dealt by Fire attacks is reduced by 5.

rows.name: Gothos Tower
rows.ability: Creatures not named Lord Van Bloot have 10 less Courage. Lord Van Bloot has Invisibility: Strike 15.

rows.name: Grand Hall of Muge's Summit
rows.ability: When a Mugic counter is removed from a Creature, Grand Hall of Muge's Summit deals 10 damage to the engaged Creature controlled by the same player.

rows.name: Indigo Grove
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, you can sacrifice a non-Conjuror Creature you control. If you do, return a Conjuror Creature Card in your general discard pile to play to any unoccupied space .

rows.name: Iparu Jungle
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, flip a coin. If tails, shuffle Iparu Jungle into its controller's Location Deck and that player reveals a new active Location. Mirage: At the beginning of combat, each engaged Creature in this space gains or loses Energy so its Energy is equal to its Scanned Energy.

rows.name: Iron Pillar
rows.ability: Battlegear have no abilities.

rows.name: Kiru City
rows.ability: OverWorld Creatures have an additional 10 Energy.

rows.name: Lake Ken-I-Po
rows.ability: Each Mugic has Untargetable.

rows.name: Lava Pond
rows.ability: Fire attacks deal an additional 5 damage. Damage dealt by Air attacks is reduced by 5. Creatures named Magmon have Fire 5.

rows.name: Mipedian Dew Farm
rows.ability: Scouts have Water. Engaged Creatures with Water have MC: Heal 10 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Mipedim Lounge
rows.ability: Mirage: When an Attack Card is played by a Creature in this space, its controller can flip a coin. If tails, that player sacrifices his engaged Creature. If heads, the attack deals an additional 10 damage, and that player can flip again.

rows.name: Mipedim Mirage
rows.ability: Creatures have Swift 1. Mirage: If an adjacent Creature can move into this space, it must do so.

rows.name: Mipedim Oasis
rows.ability: Mipedian Creatures deal an additional 10 damage with their first attack each combat.

rows.name: Mount Pillar
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, activate Hive.

rows.name: Mount Pillar Reservoir
rows.ability: Creatures have Fireproof 10. Danian Creatures have Water 5.

rows.name: Oipont's Lookout
rows.ability: Creatures with Air have Earth. If Hive is Active, Danian Creatures have Air and Earth.

rows.name: OverWorld Embassy at Mipedim Oasis
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, shuffle any Mirage Locations into their controllers' Location Decks. Mipedian Creatures have Water.

rows.name: OverWorld Embassy at Mount Pillar
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, Uninfect all Creatures.

rows.name: Queen's Gate
rows.ability: Creatures engaged with Scouts do not have and cannot gain Invisibility.

rows.name: Rao'Pa Sahkk, The Ocean with No Water
rows.ability: Attacks that are either Air or Earth deal an additional 5 damage. (Attacks which are both Air and Earth deal only 5 additional damage.) When a Water attack is played, that attack's controller reveals a new active Location. Mirage: When combat ends, put a Mugic counter on Creatures in this space who were engaged.

rows.name: Ravanaugh Ridge
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, if a player controls an engaged Creature with Air, that player can look at the top three cards of their Attack Deck, put one of them on top of that deck and the others on the bottom in any order.

rows.name: Riverlands
rows.ability: When a Creature deals Water damage, heal 5 damage to it.

rows.name: Runic Grove
rows.ability: Tribal Mugic cannot be played.

rows.name: Sands of the Unseen
rows.ability: Creatures with Air have Invisibility: Strike 10.

rows.name: Sha-Kree Flats
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, engaged Elementalist Creatures gain an Elemental type of their controller's choice.

rows.name: Stone Pillar
rows.ability: Engaged UnderWorld Creatures pay 1 less Mugic counter to play their first Mugic this turn.

rows.name: Stronghold Morn
rows.ability: At the beginning of combat, engaged Creatures gain Fire, Water, Air, and Earth.

rows.name: The Barracks
rows.ability: At the end of combat, if a Warrior you control was engaged that combat, you can relocate it to any unoccupied space adjacent to it.

rows.name: The Darkened Dunes
rows.ability: Creatures with Earth have Range and Swift 1.

rows.name: The Hunter's Perimeter
rows.ability: When this becomes the active Location, Mipedian Creatures gain Invisibility: Surprise. At the beginning of combat, reveal a new active Location. Mirage: Creatures in this space cannot lose Invisibility from Mugic or abilities. Invisibility abilities of Creatures in this space work against Creatures with Invisibility.

rows.name: The Storm Tunnel
rows.ability: Air attacks deal an additional 5 damage. Damage dealt by Water attacks is reduced by 5.

rows.name: UnderWorld City
rows.ability: Attacks played by UnderWorld Creatures have Challenge Power 15: Deal 5 damage.

rows.name: UnderWorld Colosseum
rows.ability: Creatures with Fire deal an additional 10 damage on their first attack each combat.

rows.name: Wooden Pillar
rows.ability: Creatures must pay an additional Mugic counter to play OverWorld Mugic Cards.

rows.name: Armament Adagio
rows.ability: Swap any Battlegear on two target Creatures controlled by the same player.

rows.name: Canon of Casualty
rows.ability: Deal 20 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Cascade Symphony
rows.ability: Damage dealt to target Creature by Fire or Air attacks is reduced by 5. (An attack which is both Fire and Air is still reduced by 5.)

rows.name: Cascading Rondo
rows.ability: Swap your attack discard pile with your Attack Deck, then shuffle your Attack Deck.

rows.name: Casters' Warsong
rows.ability: Deal 5 damage to target Creature. If the caster of this Mugic is a Muge, deal an additional 10 damage.

rows.name: Chorus of Cothica
rows.ability: Target Creature can play Mugic of any tribe.

rows.name: Chorus of the Hive
rows.ability: Activate Hive.

rows.name: Composition of Concentration
rows.ability: Target Creature gains 30 in the Discipline of your choice.

rows.name: Danian Element Choral
rows.ability: Target Creature gains all Elemental Types your Creatures have.

rows.name: Decrescendo
rows.ability: Deal 5 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Defender's Song
rows.ability: Creatures you control gain Defender.

rows.name: Discord of Disarming
rows.ability: Destroy target Battlegear.

rows.name: Dissonance of Distraction
rows.ability: Target Creature loses 30 in the Discipline of your choice.

rows.name: Echoes of Empty Hands
rows.ability: Destroy all Battlegear equipped to target engaged Creature. That Creature gains 10 Energy.

rows.name: Elemental Denial
rows.ability: Target Creature loses X Elemental Types of your choice.

rows.name: Elemental Elegy
rows.ability: Target Creature loses an Elemental Type of your choice. If that Creature has no Elemental Types, it cannot move instead.

rows.name: Ember Flourish
rows.ability: Heal 15 damage to target Creature with Air or Fire.

rows.name: Fanfare of the Vanishing
rows.ability: Target Creature gains Invisibility: Strike 15.

rows.name: Fighters' Fanfare
rows.ability: Damage dealt by the next attack that resolves this turn is dealt to target engaged Creature instead. (Damage is calculated with target as the recipient.)

rows.name: Forgotten Origins
rows.ability: Target player removes all cards in their general discard pile from the game.

rows.name: Fortissimo
rows.ability: Target Creature gains 5 Courage, Power, Wisdom, Speed, and Energy.

rows.name: Gear Glissando
rows.ability: Flip target Battlegear face-up or face-down.

rows.name: Geo Flourish
rows.ability: Heal 15 damage to target Creature with Earth or Water.

rows.name: Hive Destruction
rows.ability: Deactivate Hive.

rows.name: Hive Unsung
rows.ability: Deactivate Hive. As Hive Unsung is played, its caster can pay a Mugic counter. If the caster does, return Hive Unsung to your hand when it resolves.

rows.name: Hymn of Teleportation
rows.ability: Choose one: If the Active Location is a Mirage, put it into play on any space and reveal a new active Location. Move target Mirage Location in play to any place .

rows.name: Hymn of the Elements
rows.ability: Target Creature gains an Elemental Type of your choice.

rows.name: Infectious Melody
rows.ability: Infect up to two target Uninfected Creatures.

rows.name: Interlude of Consequence
rows.ability: Shuffle target player's Attack Deck or Location Deck.

rows.name: Melodic Might
rows.ability: Draw two Attack Cards, then discard two Attack Cards.

rows.name: Melody of Malady
rows.ability: Target engaged Creature gains 10 Energy. Deal 5 damage to another target engaged Creature.

rows.name: Melody of Mirage
rows.ability: Target attack deals 0 damage.

rows.name: Melody of Parasitic Mayhem
rows.ability: Infect target Uninfected engaged Creature. If Hive is Active, Uninfect all Creatures controlled by an opponent and deal 5 damage to target engaged Creature for each Creature Uninfected this way instead.

rows.name: Melody of the Meek
rows.ability: If target Creature with 30 or less Scanned Energy would take greater than 10 damage from a single source, it takes 10 damage instead.

rows.name: Minor Flourish
rows.ability: Heal 10 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Momental Virtuosity
rows.ability: Target Creature gains 50 in the Discipline of your choice. Target Creature gains 50 in another Discipline of your choice. (You can target the same Creature.)

rows.name: Mugic Reprise
rows.ability: Return target Mugic Card from your general discard pile to your hand.

rows.name: Notes of Neverwhere
rows.ability: The active Location loses all abilities.

rows.name: OverWorld Aria
rows.ability: Heal 10 damage to target OverWorld Creature. Damage dealt to that Creature by Fire attacks is reduced by 5.

rows.name: Prelude of Protection
rows.ability: Target Creature gains Fireproof 10 , Airproof 10 , Earthproof 10 , and Waterproof 10.

rows.name: Purge Dirge
rows.ability: Deal 5 damage to target Creature for each Mandiblor you control and each Infected Creature in play, then Uninfect all Creatures.

rows.name: Recurring Rescue
rows.ability: Heal 10 damage to target Creature. If the target of Recurring Rescue has 30 or less Scanned Energy, return Recurring Rescue to your hand when it resolves.

rows.name: Refrain of Denial
rows.ability: Negate target Mugic.

rows.name: Refrain of Denial, (OverWorld)
rows.ability: Negate target Generic or OverWorld Mugic.

rows.name: Refrain of Denial, (OverWorld/UnderWorld)
rows.ability: Negate target OverWorld or UnderWorld Mugic.

rows.name: Rhyme of the Reckless
rows.ability: When target attack deals damage, deal the same amount of damage to the Creature that played that attack.

rows.name: Serenade of Subordinance
rows.ability: Target Creature loses 50 in the Discipline of your choice. Target Creature gains 50 in another Discipline of your choice. (You can target the same Creature.)

rows.name: Song of Asperity
rows.ability: Target Creature gains Fire 5 and Air 5.

rows.name: Song of Deflection
rows.ability: Change the target of target Mugic or ability with a single target.

rows.name: Song of Desperation
rows.ability: Target engaged Creature gains 30 Energy. Discipline Checks and Challenges on attacks played by that Creature deal 0 damage.

rows.name: Song of EmberNova
rows.ability: Deal 10 damage to target Creature with Air or Fire.

rows.name: Song of Encompassing
rows.ability: Creatures you control gain the Creature Type Mandiblor in addition to their other types.

rows.name: Song of Focus
rows.ability: Target Creature gains 10 Courage, Power, Wisdom, and Speed.

rows.name: Song of Fury
rows.ability: Deal 10 damage to target Creature. Another target Creature gains Fire 5.

rows.name: Song of Futuresight
rows.ability: Look at the top two cards of target player's Attack Deck or Location Deck. Put one of them on top of that deck and the other on the bottom.

rows.name: Song of GeoNova
rows.ability: Deal 10 damage to target Creature with Earth or Water.

rows.name: Song of Mandiblor
rows.ability: Target Creature gains 5 Courage, Power, Wisdom, and Speed for each Danian Creature in play.

rows.name: Song of Recovery
rows.ability: Heal 10 damage to target Creature. That Creature gains Air 5.

rows.name: Song of Resilience
rows.ability: If target Creature has Fire, it gains Fireproof 10 ; if it has Air, it gains Airproof 10 ; if it has Earth, it gains Earthproof 10 ; if it has Water, it gains Waterproof 10.

rows.name: Song of Resistance
rows.ability: Damage dealt by attacks to the caster is reduced by 5.

rows.name: Song of Resurgence
rows.ability: Heal 20 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Song of Revival, (UnderWorld)
rows.ability: Return target UnderWorld Creature Card in your general discard pile to play to any unoccupied space .

rows.name: Song of Shelter
rows.ability: Target Creature you control cannot be targeted by Mugic or abilities.

rows.name: Song of Stasis
rows.ability: Target Creature cannot move.

rows.name: Song of Surprisal
rows.ability: Target Creature gains Range and Swift 1.

rows.name: Song of Symmetry
rows.ability: Target engaged Creature gains 10 Energy. Deal 10 damage to another target engaged Creature.

rows.name: Song of the Dyad
rows.ability: Choose one: Heal 10 damage to target Creature. Deal 10 damage to target Creature.

rows.name: Song of Treachery
rows.ability: Target Creature loses 15 Courage, Power, Wisdom, and Speed.

rows.name: Song of Truesight
rows.ability: Target Creature loses Invisibility.

rows.name: Strain of Ash
rows.ability: Sacrifice a Battlegear equipped to an unengaged UnderWorld Creature you control. If you do, destroy target Battlegear.

rows.name: Strain of Clarity
rows.ability: Choose one: Shuffle target Mirage Location into its controller's Location Deck. If the active Location is a Mirage, shuffle it into its controller's Location deck and that player reveals a new active Location.

rows.name: Strain of Expensive Delusions
rows.ability: Destroy all Battlegear equipped to Creatures in the same space as target Mirage Location. Shuffle it into its controller's Location Deck.

rows.name: Strain of Infection
rows.ability: Uninfect up to three Infected Creatures. Put a Mugic counter on target Danian Creature for each Creature Uninfected by Strain of Infection this way.

rows.name: Strain of the Tide
rows.ability: Remove any number of OverWorld Creatures in your general discard pile from the game. Heal 10 damage to target Creature for each card you remove this way.

rows.name: Switch Riff
rows.ability: Swap the spaces of two target unengaged Mipedian Creatures you control.

rows.name: Trills of Diminution
rows.ability: Target engaged Creature loses all abilities.

rows.name: Tune of Xerium
rows.ability: Sacrifice a Battlegear. If you do, return another Battlegear from your general discard pile to play equipped to an unequipped Creature you control.

rows.name: Void Dirge
rows.ability: Remove up to three target cards in one general discard pile from the game.
